violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Repair counter by front hand wash sink.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside all coolers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all shelving in kitchen and in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Entire facility needs deep cleaned.
